attributes.description: tool_loop_gate decisions over time, split by decision (allow / block_* / warn_* / advise_*)
attributes.title: Gate Decisions Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "area", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Gate decisions"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "decision", "size": 8, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Gate Decisions Over Time"}

attributes.description: Allow vs block vs warn split across all tool-loop gate decisions
attributes.title: Gate Decision Outcomes
attributes.visState: {"type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Gate decisions"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "decision", "size": 8, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true}, "title": "Gate Decision Outcomes"}

attributes.description: Gate decisions broken down per tool, split by decision
attributes.title: Gate Activity by Tool
attributes.visState: {"type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Decisions"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "tool_name", "size": 15, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "decision", "size": 6, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false}, "title": "Gate Activity by Tool"}

attributes.description: Top reasons for non-allow gate decisions (block / warn / advise)
attributes.title: Top Gate Block / Warn Reasons
attributes.visState: {"type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Decisions"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "reason", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false}, "title": "Top Gate Block / Warn Reasons"}

attributes.description: route_trace_written gateway_label distribution: the deterministic stimulus -> model path label (FRE-452 ledger ES slice)
attributes.title: Route-Trace: Stimulus -> Path Label
attributes.visState: {"type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Turns"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "gateway_label", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true}, "title": "Route-Trace: Stimulus -> Path Label"}

attributes.description: route_trace_written orchestration_event over time: what actually happened (primary_handled vs delegate_called)
attributes.title: Route-Trace: Orchestration Outcome Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Turns"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "orchestration_event", "size": 8, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Route-Trace: Orchestration Outcome Over Time"}

attributes.description: L0 traversal substrate: tool-loop gate decisions (FRE-506) + route-trace ledger ES slice (FRE-452). Execution-topology label + rich per-turn ledger fields are Postgres-only and deferred to a follow-up ES emitter.
attributes.title: Traversal Ledger & Gate Decisions
